exec_kpi_verified.phase: Phase 4 item 6 (stub resolved — Schneider is a validated client)
exec_kpi_verified.headline: SUM(campaigns[].leads) over programs with a target (641 over 4 lead-gen programs at verification: heavy 255/619, eba 162/157, airset 133/157, water_env 91/184)
exec_kpi_verified.target: SUM(campaigns[].target) over the same programs (1117); per-program flight windows (flight_start/flight_end) drive the even pace-to-date and the 'programs on pace' count
exec_kpi_verified.series: cs_weekly[].week_start / leads (77 weekly points at verification)
exec_kpi_verified.db_crosscheck: Central keyKpi: NEL '0.10% CTR' + global_rebrand are AWARENESS programs (CTR KPIs, target 0 in data.json) and are correctly EXCLUDED from this lead KPI; the lead-gen rows carry the lead targets

primary_kpi.label: MQL + HQL from lead-gen program
primary_kpi.definition: Marketing- or highly-qualified lead within one of the 5 scoped lead-gen programs
